commands.review_summary:
The PR changes subagent restart recovery so stale unended runs are pruned or skipped even when their child session has `abortedLastRun`, with matching docs and persistence-test updates.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests -9, Docs 0. Total -1 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main exempts `abortedLastRun` restored runs from stale pruning, and the existing persistence test expected that stale aborted run to be resumed. I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the session-state cutoff, not a narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to make.

target.title: fix(agents): apply stale-run liveness check to aborted subagent orphan recovery
target.body:
## Summary

修复 #90766: orphan recovery 在网关重启后恢复过于陈旧的 subagent session。

两处修改：
1. **`subagent-registry-helpers.ts`**: 移除 `resolveSubagentRunOrphanReason` 中对 `abortedLastRun: true` session 的 stale-unended 豁免——现在所有过期 run 在 registry restore 时都会被清理
2. **`subagent-orphan-recovery.ts`**: 在 `recoverOrphanedSubagentSessions` 中新增 `isStaleUnendedSubagentRun` 检查，跳过超过 stale-run 窗口(默认2小时)的 aborted session

## Test plan

- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-registry.persistence.test.ts` — 18/18 通过
- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/subagent-orphan-recovery.test.ts` — 19/19 通过

## Verification

之前的行为：stale(3小时) + `abortedLastRun: true` 的 subagent 会被恢复

现在的行为：stale run 无论 `abortedLastRun` 状态如何都会被 prune

Fixes: #90766

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: huangting-xy
